hooks.command:
echo '
📋 Session ending. Did you update CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md? If architectural decisions were made this session, commit and push before /clear.'
bash -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && git diff --quiet HEAD || echo "⚠️ Unpushed commits detected. Push before /clear."' || true
bash -c 'git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ Git repo ready" || echo "Not a git repo"' || true
